name: bookshelf-monorepo
description: 개발자 채용 테스트 - 개인 도서 관리 서비스

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/shared && npm install && cd ../../apps/frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
